title: Golden Globe Awards 2026: See the Complete Winners List
text: Rolling Stone provided the complete winners list for the 2026 Golden Globe Awards. The comprehensive coverage included all major categories and winners, documenting Paul Thomas Anderson's Best Director victory for 'One Battle After Another.' Rolling Stone's coverage serves as a reference for understanding the complete scope of the awards ceremony and which films and filmmakers achieved major recognition. The publication's entertainment-focused audience follows awards season closely and values detailed coverage of major ceremonies.
